title: Plus One on HSN!
excerpt: So excited to finally be able to share the news that I will be showcasing my Plus One collection on HSN on Monday, March 24th! It's Live TV (yikes) and there will be 5 deeply discounted bundles for sale that…
body:
So excited to finally be able to share the news that I will be showcasing my Plus One collection on HSN on Monday, March 24th! It's Live TV (yikes) and there will be 5 deeply discounted bundles for sale that you won't want to miss (yay)! Hope you will tune in or set your DVR's and help spread the word.One of my favorite aspects of designing signature lines is when I see how others interpret the products in their own creative ways. Here are a few fantastic projects that I've spotted recently:

DIY Baby Memory Calendar by Jamie from Creating Really Awesome Free Things

Scrappy Happy Banner by Kristi from I Should Be Mopping the Floor

Hand-Stitched Note Cards by Sarah from Bombshell Bling

Ruffled Gift Card Holder by Katie from Made to Be a Momma
